name: greened-platform
description: Gamified Environmental Education Platform for Punjab Schools & Colleges

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx prisma db seed

author: GreenEd Platform Team
